pages.title: Private Gastroenterologist | Windsor | Windsor Gastroenterology
pages.metaDescription: Dr Richard Sarsam is a consulting gastroenterologist practicing in Windsor, Maidenhead, and Slough - Windsor Gastroenterology
mainBlocks: Dr Richard SarsamI was appointed as consultant gastroenterologist at Heatherwood and Wexham Park Hospital in 2002 following completion of specialist training in gastroenterology and general internal medicine in the north and south Thames London deanery rotating between teaching hospitals and district general hospitals including the Royal Free Hospital liver unit, Guys and St Thomas’ Hospital and the Royal Sussex University Hospital Brighton. I also spent 2 years in research at the academic gastroenterology department of Guys Hospital in London studying the relationship between bile acids, intestinal bacteria and gallstones I have performed over 10,000 gastroscopies, over 10,000 colonoscopies and over 2000 ERCPs.Telephone01753 856238Emailsecretaries.rsarsam@gmail.com

pages.name: procedures-offered
pages.title: Procedures Offered | Windsor | Windsor Gastroenterology
pages.metaDescription: Dr Sarsam offers a wide range of diagnostic and therapeutic procedures including colon cancer screening and capsule endoscopy
mainBlocks: Procedures Offered Diagnostic and therapeutic gastroscopy including oesophageal stenting, and duodenal stenting, oesophageal dilatation, PEG tube insertion, variceal banding Diagnostic and therapeutic colonoscopy including polypectomy, Endoscopic mucosal resection (EMR) and haemorrhoidal banding Colon cancer screening Diagnostic and therapeutic ERCP H. pylori and hydrogen breath testing Capsule endoscopy of the small intestine Bravo PH monitoring for acid reflux EDUCATION AND TRAININGCONDITIONS TREATEDRectal bleeding Change in bowel habit Abdominal pain Abnormal liver function tests Anaemia Acid reflux Jaundice Indigestion (dyspepsia)2002 - Present Frimley NHS Trust Consultant at Heatherwood and Wexham Park Hospitals1993 - 2002 Specialist Training in The London Deanery ​
